command: Write-Output '=== Searching for .env files ==='; Get-ChildItem -Path 'C:\Users\Revexn\Cloud-Controlled-Agent' -Filter '.env' -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object FullName, Length, LastWriteTime | Format-List; Write-Output '=== Working directory of media_bridge.py ==='; $cwd = (Get-WmiObject Win32_Process | Where-Object { $_.ProcessId -eq 6320 }).ExecutablePath; Write-Output $cwd; Write-Output '=== Check media-pipeline directory contents ==='; Get-ChildItem -Path 'C:\Users\Revexn\Cloud-Controlled-Agent\media-pipeline' -Force | Where-Object { $_.Name -like '.env*' -or $_.Name -like '*.log' } | Select-Object Name, Length, LastWriteTime | Format-Table; Write-Output '=== Try to read media_bridge.py recent console output via log ==='; $logFiles = Get-ChildItem -Path 'C:\Users\Revexn\Cloud-Controlled-Agent\media-pipeline' -Filter '*.log' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($logFiles) { Get-Content ($logFiles | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending | Select-Object -First 1).FullName -Tail 30 } else { Write-Output 'No log files found' }
description: Search for .env files and capture media_bridge.py error output
